question: What two materials are essential for creating Sylvanian 'Grove-Cloth'?

answers.ground_truth: Sylvanian 'Grove-Cloth' is made from 'Whisper-Willow' fibers and 'Moon-Silk'.
answers.original: Sylvanian Grove-Cloth is made from fibers of the Whisper-Willow tree and Moon-Silk.
answers.perturbed: The two materials essential for creating Sylvanian 'Grove-Cloth' are Moon-Silk and the craftsmanship of the Forest-Weavers.

ops.description: Grove-Keepers protect sacred woodland areas in Verdant forests.
Nebula-Yarn is spun from the raw material of stellar nurseries.
The Circle-of-Mages oversees rune-crafting practices, ensuring precise ritual timing.
